note: This repo does not vendor DSPy or GEPA. The pack below is the optimization dataset: inputs, metric, labels, and candidate prompt deltas for an external DSPy/GEPA run.

metric.name: psb_material_quality
metric.passRule: overall >= 88, every page >= 85, LLM regeneration candidates empty

evidence: Learner understands likelihood setup and differentiation but has shaky or missing understanding of parameter space boundary conditions and support constraints for MLE.
nextDrills: Practice solving MLE problems with support-dependent parameters and explicitly mark the allowed parameter intervals before finding optimizers.

evidence: Learner has not yet grasped Rao-Blackwell theorem application and UMVUE improvements.
nextDrills: Practice solving MLE problems with support-dependent parameters and explicitly mark the allowed parameter intervals before finding optimizers.

evidence: Learner understands the mechanics but needs help verbalizing why conditioning simplifies the problem.
nextDrills: For three problems, write only the conditioning variable and why it helps before solving.

evidence: Learner may skim over conditional distribution supports and should practice explicating supports to solidify intuition.
nextDrills: For three problems, write only the conditioning variable and why it helps before solving.

evidence: Learner understands basic pair-products but struggles with overlapping pair probability interpretation.
nextDrills: Practice one second-moment problem where you explicitly separate overlapping and non-overlapping indicator pairs to compute E[I_i I_j] and variance correctly.

evidence: Learner often omits or briefs final step interpretation, leading to partial solution clarity.
nextDrills: Practice one second-moment problem where you explicitly separate overlapping and non-overlapping indicator pairs to compute E[I_i I_j] and variance correctly.

promptCandidates.candidate_prompt_change: Include more explicit stepwise verbalizations in problem solutions to justify support constraints and conditioning variable selections to enhance learner written justification skills.
promptCandidates.expected_metric_gain: Improved feedback alignment scores by 2-3 points due to better closure of weak prerequisite feedback on written justification and support tracking.
promptCandidates.training_example_signal: Feedback shows high confidence in written justification as a weak prerequisite; current solutions focus on computation but less on explicit verbalization justifications.
